name: Discovery Engine — Paper Extraction
tagline: Extract structured knowledge from scientific papers autonomously
description: The agent discovers scientific papers from arXiv, PubMed Central, OpenAlex, and OSTI, reads them, and extracts structured knowledge (entities, relations, cross-domain connections) directly. No API keys or external LLM needed — the agent is the extractor. Results are submitted as PRs to build an open-access knowledge graph.
